Geography.Territory: Largest and most fertile grasslands in the known world
Defensive Features: Two sides of the territory are secured by the impassable banks of major rivers
Third side is bordered by the dense, ancient Oakwood forest

Key Features: One Council Leader from the existing representatives
Food production is the main economic driver

Institutions: The Windrunners: courier service and communication relay system
Spiritual and Linguistic Identity: Wind Readers: shamanistic oracles and spiritual leaders

Primary Defensive Tactics: Snare lines with metal bells and noisemakers
Primary Military Composition: Wolf-like and Coyote-like folk: general military duties
Wolverines: elite warriors and city guard
Symbiotic Defense: Bat Folk: night watch and surveillance network
